meta.verbatim_note: All values exactly as printed, supplier errors preserved. Fields whose variant mapping cannot be read with certainty are listed in AMBIGUEDADES.md and marked pendiente_proveedor in spec.es.json.

engine.type: 4 Cylinders in line, high presure, electrical commom-rail diesel fuel injection system, water cooling, turb charging, inter cooling

brake_system_2_as_printed._note: The catalog prints a second section header 'Brake System' over these rows; the grouping is the supplier's layout error, preserved here as printed.

marketing_claims_p1_verbatim._note: Supplier marketing copy, page 1. Claims, not spec evidence. '150 horsepower' conflicts with the table's 139KW (~186 hp) — filed as ambiguity (f).
blurbs: Powerful and fuel efficient. Equipped with a super common rail engine, model ISUZU 4HK1-TCG61, 150 horsepower, providing high torque, and similar to ISUZU The gearbox cooperates to provide continuous power.
Multifunctional cabin design Features a large, strong, durable chassis.
Drive with confidence Using anti-roll bars (stabilizers) front and rear helpS.Excellent grip when entering corners.
It adopts carefully designed suspension and is extremely stable. When transporting, it is best equipped with tubeless tires to better maintain the road surface.
Air brake system: double guarantee of safe braking and reliable starting. Equipped with ABS, it improves the stability and reliability of braking and starting, making every driving safer.
marketing_claims_p1_verbatim.footer_banner: One-stop R&D And Integration Solution Provider

disclaimer_p2_verbatim: * THE SPECIFICATIONS ARE SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT NOTICE. THE PICTURES MAY INCLUDE OPTIONS. THE ACTU AL COLOR & APPEARANCE OF THE PRODUCT MAY DIFFER FROM WHAT IS SHOWN.

dimension_diagram_labels_p2._note: Letter codes printed on the three line drawings, p2 bottom. Numeric dimension values are NOT printed in the catalog — only the letter codes. Filed as ambiguity (g): request the dimension table.
